offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payroll entries/month, manual formatting causes delayed payments. We convert raw timesheet entries into formatted payroll input files instead of manual formatting of timesheet entries.
problem: Inaccurate payroll input files lead to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about payroll workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and export to payroll formats
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
